member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AdditionalControls.Classes.InputBox
member.summary: Recreation of Visual Basic's Interactivity.InputBox for Avalonia

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AdditionalControls.Classes.InputBox.ShowAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,Avalonia.Controls.Window)
member.summary: Shows a dialog box with a prompt and an input field
member.param: The prompt to display
The title of the dialog box
The default response to display in the input field

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.CheckedListBox.#ctor
member.summary: Implementation of CheckedListBox from WinForms, but for Avalonia

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.CheckedListBox.ItemsCollectionChanged(System.Object,System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Items were changed, so we need to subscribe to PropertyChanged event of new items and unsubscribe from old items

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.CheckedListBox.ItemPropertyChanged(System.Object,System.ComponentModel.PropertyChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Item's property was changed, so we need to raise SelectedValueChanged event

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.CheckedListBox.InitializeComponent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wires up the controls and optionally loads XAML markup and attaches dev tools (if Avalonia.Diagnostics package is referenced).
member.param: Should the XAML be loaded into the component.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.CheckedListBoxItem
member.summary: Item for CheckedListBox

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUIBuilder
member.summary: Avalonia app builder with platform detection, Inter font and logging to trace

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUIBuilder.GetAvaloniaAppBuilder(Avalonia.Styling.ThemeVariant,System.Nullable{Avalonia.Themes.Fluent.DensityStyle},Avalonia.Themes.Fluent.ColorPaletteResources,Avalonia.Themes.Fluent.ColorPaletteResources)
member.summary: Ready to use Avalonia app builder with platform detection, Inter font and logging to trace. Use it for BuildAvaloniaApp for a Visual Studio visual designer
member.param: Theme - auto, dark, light
Density - normal, compact
ColorPaletteResources for light theme
ColorPaletteResources for dark theme
member.returns: App builder to use for designtr

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI
member.summary: Avalonia singleton, to create app if it doesn't exist and use it to show AutoUI windows; all calls should be from the UI thread (use Dispatcher.UIThread)

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI.InitializeBase
member.summary: Initalizes Avalonia module initialization

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI.IsRunning
member.summary: Checks if Avalonia is running

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI.AvaloniaApplication
member.summary: Gets the Avalonia application instance

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI.#cctor
member.summary: Static constructor to initialize Avalonia; must be called from the main application thread

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI.StartMainWindow(Bwl.Framework.IUIWindow)
member.summary: Starts Avalonia with the main window; app is closed when main window is closed. CAREFUL, THIS WILL BLOCK THE CALLING THREAD! Important! Will not work if you will call it using Dispatcher.UIThread!
member.param: Window to show

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI.StartMainWindow(Avalonia.Controls.Window)
member.summary: Starts Avalonia with the main window; app is closed when main window is closed. CAREFUL, THIS WILL BLOCK THE CALLING THREAD! Important! Will not work if you will call it using Dispatcher.UIThread!
member.param: Window to show

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI.StartHeadless
member.summary: Starts Avalonia without a window; app is closed when Stop() is called. CAREFUL, THIS WILL BLOCK THE CALLING THREAD! Important! Will not work if you will call it using Dispatcher.UIThread!

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.Avalonia.AvaloniaUI.StopApplication
member.summary: Stops the Avalonia application completely
